message:
Command `# LEF files are only 1.4MB total for cell lef. Padframe LEF:
du -sh /nc/apps/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/libs.ref/sky130_fd_io/lef/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Total input to read: 3 sky130 libs (37MB) + 3 CF_SRAM libs (~3MB) + lef (2MB) + io lef
# = about 45-50MB. But rchar=220MB. 
# The rest of the rchar is likely from reading the ODB through pread64 or similar.
# 
# DIAGNOSIS: The process IS making progress, just slowly.
# check_antennas -verbose on 107K routed nets takes a very long time.
# PSM-0069 (VCCD/VSSD connectivity) will be called AGAIN here.
# But this time it might just be a warning, not an error (different context).
#
# Let's check: does check_antennas abort on PSM-0069 or continue?
# Look at the OpenROAD antenna checker behavior:
grep -n "PSM\|connectivity\|check_connect" \
    /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/antenna_check.tcl 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code -1.
